How It Works

Three simple steps. No account, no waiting, no uploading.

01

Upload Your Audio

Drag and drop or select an MP3, WAV, M4A, OGG, or OPUS file. Files stay 100% on your device.

02

Transcribe with AI

Whisper AI runs in your browser. Watch your audio turn into accurate, timestamped text in real time.

03

Download SRT File

Edit any line, customize subtitle settings, preview in real time, and download a ready-to-use .srt file.

Try It Now — It's Free →

Everything You Need. Nothing You Don't.

All the features that matter, none of the bloat.

No Limits

Transcribe files of any length. No daily cap, no minute limit, no premium tier. Truly unlimited.

No Signup

No email, no password, no account. Open the page, use the tool, done. Zero friction.

Privacy-First

Whisper AI runs in your browser. Audio is never uploaded. Your content is always yours alone.

SRT Export

Download properly formatted .srt files ready for YouTube, Premiere Pro, Final Cut, DaVinci, and more.

Subtitle Editor

Click any line to edit. Adjust character limits, font, size, color, position, and preview live.

Works in Browser

No app to install, no extension needed. Works in Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge on any device.

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about free audio transcription with AudioSRT.

Is AudioSRT really free?

Yes, AudioSRT is completely free with no hidden fees, no subscription, and no credit card required. You can transcribe as many audio files as you like at no cost.

Do I need to create an account?

No. AudioSRT requires no signup, no email, and no account of any kind. Open the tool and start transcribing immediately.

Is there a file size limit?

No. Since your audio is processed locally in your browser using on-device AI, there are no server-imposed file size limits. Processing time depends on your device's speed.

Is my audio uploaded to any server?

Absolutely not. AudioSRT uses Whisper AI running directly in your browser via Transformers.js. Your audio file never leaves your device and is never sent to any server.

What audio formats are supported?

AudioSRT supports MP3, WAV, M4A, OGG, and OPUS audio files. Most common audio formats are covered.

What is an SRT file?

An SRT (SubRip Subtitle) file is a plain text file containing subtitle text with timecodes. It is the most widely supported subtitle format, compatible with YouTube, VLC, Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, and virtually every video platform and editor.

How accurate is the transcription?

AudioSRT uses OpenAI's Whisper model running in your browser. Accuracy is very high for clear English audio — typically 90-95%+ for good quality recordings. Accuracy improves with clear audio, minimal background noise, and standard accents.

Can I edit the transcription before downloading?

Yes. Every line of the transcript is directly editable after transcription. Click any line to edit it, correct errors, adjust wording, or remove sections before downloading your SRT file.

Does AudioSRT work on mobile devices?

Yes, AudioSRT is fully responsive and works on modern mobile browsers. However, transcription performance is faster on desktop devices due to the AI model's computational requirements.

Which video editors accept SRT files?

SRT files are accepted by virtually all professional video editors including Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve, CapCut, iMovie, and all major platforms like YouTube, Vimeo, and TikTok.

Ready to Transcribe?

Start generating accurate transcriptions and SRT subtitle files in seconds. Free, forever.
